title: Delicate Irish Beef Fritters
description: Tender Irish beef mixed with delicate herbs and spices, formed into crispy fritters for a satisfying snack.
instructions: 2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the ground Irish beef, onion, breadcrumbs, eggs, cheddar cheese, herbs, salt, and pepper.
3. Using your hands, mix the ingredients together until just combined.
4. Divide the mixture into 8-10 portions, depending on desired fritter size.
5. Shape each portion into a ball and then flatten slightly into a disk shape.
6. Dip each fritter into the fritter batter, coating both sides evenly.
7. Heat a large non-stick skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
8. When the skillet is hot, add a few of the fritters and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and crispy.
9. Transfer the fritters to a baking sheet and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until cooked through.
10. Serve the fritters hot and enjoy!
